summary.summary: Dynamic and agile data engineer with a strong foundation in distributed systems, data pipelines, and automation. Experienced in designing, coding, and deploying scalable solutions. Adept at working with large-scale data and collaborating across teams.

education.title: University of Waterloo
description: Awards: Presidents Scholarship of Distinction, Dean’s Honours List
Course-Work: Databased (RMDBs), Distributed Systems (Big Data), Machine Learning

experience.title: Environics Analytics
description: Built an adaptive French translation pipeline using Alteryx, SQL, and a deep learning AI model API to automate data product and document translations, resulting in ~$40K in savings per product translation.
Built a Python app to extract, filter and export client product-usage data from databases featuring efficient processing of large tables, streamlining non-technical team workflows.
Enhanced database systems to track product usage and support data-driven pricing strategies.

experience.title: Martinrea International
description: Co-lead a major project to optimize the flow of materials across a factory using an a system for collecting and analyzing data to plan the project, increasing output and cost efficiency by ~30%.
Built a supply chain monitoring system with ETL analysis of data warehouses and Apache Spark, resulting in $10K+ annual savings.

experience.title: Timeplay
description:
Improved UI for lottery and instant-win games through market-research and development with React and TypeScript, supporting the rollout of a mobile-gaming platform on cruise ships from inception to deployment.
Optimized NoSQL schemas and API architecture in Go to improve backend performance and clarity for developers.
Enhanced CI/CD pipelines, deploying new features to mobile and web platforms, leading to a 30% increase in user engagement.

projects.title: Distributed Spam Email Classifier
description:
Built a distributed pipeline with Apache Spark and HDFS to train a spam classifier on large datasets (~1GB+).
Implemented optimized stochastic gradient descent for high-efficiency model training.

projects.title: Automated Restaurant Reservation Business
description: Founded a service securing high-demand restaurant reservations, generating ~$3K/month.
Deployed on distributed systems using Google Cloud Scheduler, an automated Task Manager for scalability and efficiency and cloud storage for saving data.

projects.title: Voice-to-Instrument
description: Developed a desktop app enabling real-time translation of human voice into various musical instruments.
Implement probabilistic algorithms with Python (Numpy, Pandas, PyTorch) for detection of pitch, tempo, etc.
Exposed the backend as a REST API to integrate with a GUI built with React.
